reason: This video is an instructional/recruitment presentation about the MCG-AU Urology Residency Program (PGY-1 through PGY-5 positions), delivered by Z. Klaassen. It contains information about interview dates, program facts, rotations, faculty, residents, benefits, and location highlights. No FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) task is being performed or demonstrated. This is a career/recruitment webinar, not a surgical skills assessment video.
institution: Augusta University, Medical College of Georgia (MCG)
